author: thade.hl
title: Commission art for Azuki and Hypurr
content: Looking to commission some art for my Azuki and Hypurr. Tag your favorite artists below that you’ve commissioned and let me see your portfolios!

author: Chioma Blogs
title: Need artist for music project
content: I need an artist, graphic designer and video editor that will work on my artist project The Budget Is 1,500 Dollar The Artwork Cover, Graphic Design Should Evolve Around This Song https://open.spotify.com/track/2zEBe2fpayOuktmiLPnnZH?si=4XbI5mT2Sj2vAukJ9cDPrw
